title: tracep error: expected unqualified-id on VerilatedTraceSigType
body:
It appears https://github.com/verilator/verilator/commit/95c4ade718a21d51c661cbe37b252924c0a822cd introduced a bug when [emitting](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/blob/23836ee8d00a4da961be6c761f7610a4cee74f36/src/V3EmitCImp.cpp#L743) the `tracep` for cases where tracing is supported, but `VerilatedTraceSigType` isn't [set](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/blob/8a7f36c34b2a04a73aa2b472eb502d02d28c9a4a/src/V3Ast.h#L681) (ie `chandle`).

Verilator: 5.020
Compiler: Clang 17.0.4
OS: Rhel 8.7

Error Message
```
WARNING:root:Testbench__Trace__0__Slow.cpp:836:127: error: expected unqualified-id
WARNING:root:  836 |     tracep->declQuad(c+25,0,"foo_if",-1, VerilatedTraceSigDirection::NONE, VerilatedTraceSigKind::VAR, VerilatedTraceSigType::, false,-1, 63,0);
WARNING:root:      |                                                                                                                               ^
```

As for a fix, I'm unsure if `chandle` needs it's own value in the [enum](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/blob/23836ee8d00a4da961be6c761f7610a4cee74f36/include/verilated_trace.h#L83), if there should be some `NONE` value in the enum, or a change is needed to the [function](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/blob/23836ee8d00a4da961be6c761f7610a4cee74f36/src/V3EmitCImp.cpp#L697).


Just for reference, using an older version of verilator 5.012, the chandle will appear as
```
    tracep->declQuad(c+77,"foo_if", false,-1, 63,0);
```
